scientist_dr_ana_pell:idle.greeting: Dr. Pell does not look up from the microscope. "Walker. Two minutes. I'm at a delicate stage."

playerOptions.text: Your gene treatment is six months from generalisable.
Mira Vance is asking after you.

nodes.npcText: Pause. "You know that and you came here anyway. State your interest."
"Tell her I'm two months from publishing my own column. She'll understand the message."

officer_dale_carver:idle.greeting: Officer Carver folds his arms. "Walker. You here to file something?"

playerOptions.text: I know about your truce with Iron Hex.

nodes.npcText: His expression does not change. "Then you also know it doesn't survive being said out loud. Don't say it again. Anywhere. Including here."
